name: Gold
description: Gold grew up in a home full of baby Pokémon. His neighbors in Wakaba Town refer to his family as the "Poké House". He usually wears a pair of goggles and travels on a scooter. Instead of throwing/kicking his Poké Balls, he uses a billiard cue to shoot them out, allowing for tactical maneuvers and deployments of his Pokémon. Gold's hobbies include gambling, skateboarding, and trying foods from different cities. His favorite idol/DJ is Kurumi from the Kogane Radio Station. Dr. Yukinari Okido noted

name: Hinata Shintani

He works at a gas station. ~!Misaki-chan is Hinata's first love since elementary school, which was when Misaki-chan didn't hate guys. Eventually, after winning the cake eating contest, he finds out that Misaki works in the maid cafe. !~

name: Kirara
description: Kirara is the nekomata companion of Sango, the yōkai exterminator that hails from a mountain village of other exterminators. Kirara usually appears as a tiny and cute feline no larger than a kitten with cream-colored fur, black ears, various black markings, large red eyes, and two tails, but her true form is a large saber toothed tiger-like yōkai.

name: Rei Saiga
description: A highly skilled player in Shangri-La Frontier who holds the special title of "Attack Holder"—an honor bestowed upon the player who has unleashed the highest burst damage in the game. While they appear as a burly male character clad in a host of legendary-class armor within the game, in the real world, she is actually a charming young girl harboring a secret crush on Sunraku—aka [Rakurou Hizutome](https://anilist.co/character/271367/Rakurou-Hizutome).

name: Tomoyo Kanzaki
description: Tomoyo Kanzaki is one of the main characters of Ino Battle wa Nichijou-kei no Naka de. She has the superpower to manipulate time, "Closed Clock," and she is also part of the Literature Club. A red-haired girl who is constantly bemused by Jurai's antics. Her power allow her to speed up, slow down, or stop time, though she cannot rewind it.

name: Yukiko Kanzaki
description: She is a student of Kunugigaoka Junior High School. She is assigned to Class 3-E, where she trains to become a professional assassin, with her teacher as the target. Yukiko is diligent, ladylike, and cordial; although she does not particularly stand out, she is popular with her classmates. A very considerate individual, she had, on one occasion, volunteered to buy drinks for everyone in her class. Yukiko is deliberative and an excellent organizer. They have a strong bond with dogs, particularly the dog that was their mother, going as far as to try to kill anyone who would insult their memory.
